description: NOTE: commercial fields on this entity (agreedPrice, poValue, poValueInBase, exchangeRate, paymentTerms) are hiddenForRoles ["quality"] per axiom A17. The committed buying instruction issued to an ONBOARDED supplier from an approved requisition and awarded quotation. It hard-commits (encumbers) budget, carries the ISO 8.4.3 information-to-providers record, and is the contractual artifact the supplier acknowledges. Its number travels to GRN, invoice, match, and payment as the order-side anchor of the cycle.
lifecycleEnum: PurchaseOrderState (draft -> issued -> acknowledged -> closed; editable until first GRN)

fields.name: number
fields.label: PO No.
fields.validation: configurable pattern PO-{YYYY}-{RUNNING5}; configurable prefix/year/width; max+1 transactional/race-safe; immutable once issued
fields.purpose: Stable human-readable order key that links PurchaseOrder -> GoodsReceipt -> Invoice -> MatchResult -> Payment so every fulfilment and settlement record traces back to one order. Immutability after issue is what makes the 3-way match and audit trail credible (axiom A1 analogue for the order spine).

fields.name: requisitionId
fields.label: Requisition Ref
fields.validation: read-only, immutable; requisition must be APPROVED
fields.purpose: Ties the order back to the originating demand so spend, budget commitment, and cycle time roll up to one requisition; the upstream half of the order spine.

fields.name: quotationId
fields.label: Quotation Ref
fields.validation: read-only; must be the APPROVED award for the requisition
fields.purpose: Records which awarded quote set the price/terms so the PO line prices are traceable to the competitive comparison; supports price-variance match exceptions.

fields.name: supplierId
fields.label: Supplier
fields.validation: read-only; supplier.status must be ONBOARDED (SUSPENDED/OFFBOARDED fail the pre-condition)
fields.purpose: Names the party the order is issued to; the ONBOARDED gate (axiom A10/A11) is enforced here so quality/compliance suspension blocks new POs.

fields.name: supplierCode
fields.label: Supplier Code
fields.validation: read-only; denormalized supplier.code (S/##### configurable)
fields.purpose: Denormalized stable supplier key printed on the PO PDF and used in ERP sync and creditor-ledger postings, so the order references the supplier by its immutable natural key not just the display name.

fields.name: type
fields.label: PO Type
fields.validation: one of the set; drives dynamic form and match path (service/maintenance use scope-of-work + milestone acceptance, two-way match, no GRN; freight ranks carriers and tracks AWB/BL)
fields.purpose: The biggest order-side branch driver: selects which header fields are mandatory and whether settlement uses three-way (goods) or two-way + milestone (service/freight) match (axiom A8).

fields.name: currency
fields.label: Currency
fields.validation: a configured currency master
fields.purpose: The transaction currency of the order; the base-currency value is derived from it via the FX service so budget commitment, thresholds, and analytics are normalized (axiom A12).

fields.name: exchangeRate
fields.label: Exchange Rate
fields.validation: manual per-PO override; carries rateDate + source; blank -> FX service rate; > 0
fields.purpose: Lets the buyer pin a negotiated/contractual FX rate for this order instead of the live market rate; drives base-currency value and the realized FX gain/loss computed between PO and payment.

fields.name: incoterm
fields.label: Incoterm
fields.validation: Incoterms 2020; FOB/CIF/CFR sea-only (validate vs transport mode); air/multimodal use FCA/CPT/CIP/DAP
fields.purpose: Defines the cost/risk transfer point between buyer and supplier; drives landed-cost composition, the inbound-logistics tracking layer, and customs-document expectations at receipt.

fields.name: scopeOfWork
fields.label: Scope of Work
fields.validation: mandatory for service/maintenance, optional for item; max 5000 chars
fields.purpose: The deliverable definition for service/maintenance orders that have no item lines; the basis for milestone acceptance that replaces the GRN in the two-way match (axiom A8).

fields.name: termsAndConditions
fields.label: Terms and Conditions
fields.validation: editable per PO; pre-filled from tenant template
fields.purpose: The contractual terms printed on the PO and acknowledged by the supplier; editable so per-order terms (warranty, penalties, payment) can override the standard template.

fields.name: deliveryPlace
fields.label: Delivery Place
fields.validation: warehouse or site address
fields.purpose: Tells the supplier where to deliver; the destination the GRN and inbound logistics track against, and the local point-of-delivery in landed-cost.

fields.name: deliveryDate
fields.label: Delivery Date
fields.validation: >= today
fields.purpose: The committed delivery date; the baseline for the derived delivery status (upcoming/overdue) and the on-time factor of OTIF/perfect-order (axiom A14).

fields.name: contactPerson
fields.label: Contact Person
fields.validation: name + phone/email
fields.purpose: The buyer-side contact the supplier reaches for order queries and discrepancy raising at acknowledgement; printed on the PO PDF.

fields.name: isoDocRef
fields.label: ISO Document Ref
fields.validation: ISO 8.4.3 records traceability tag
fields.purpose: Links the PO to the controlled ISO document register so an auditor can trace the order to its quality-management-system record (ISO 7.5 / 8.4.3).

fields.name: value
fields.label: PO Value
fields.validation: sum over lines of lineValue (taxable + tax)
fields.purpose: The total order value in transaction currency including tax; recomputed on any line edit; the figure printed on the PO and reconciled in the match.

fields.name: valueInBase
fields.label: PO Value (Base Currency)
fields.validation: uses exchangeRate override if set, else FX service rate; graceful degradation to original on FX failure (e08)
fields.purpose: The normalized order amount that drives the hard budget commitment, the PO approval threshold/auto-approval, and spend analytics (axioms A4, A12). The single comparable money figure across currencies.

fields.name: acknowledged
fields.label: Acknowledged
fields.validation: set true on supplier acknowledgement via email + OTP; carries acknowledgedAt
fields.purpose: Records the supplier's confirmation of the order (ISO 8.4.3(d)); transitions state issued -> acknowledged and gates the advance-payment trigger.

fields.name: status
fields.label: Status
fields.validation: draft -> awaiting-approval -> issued -> acknowledged -> closed; closed only when all lines received + matched + paid; SoD-guarded issue (creator != approver, axiom A6)
fields.purpose: The order lifecycle position; gates which actions are legal (amend pre-receipt, acknowledge, close) and enforces the SoD approval before issue.

fields.name: editableUntilReceipt
fields.label: Editable Until Receipt
fields.validation: true while no GRN exists (state in {issued, acknowledged}); false once first GRN posted; after that only the qty-tolerance amend at receiving is allowed
fields.purpose: Locks the order from full edits once fulfilment begins so the received/matched/paid records cannot be undermined by header changes; a value-increasing amend re-enters the budget and approval gates.

fields.name: frameworkAgreementId
fields.label: Framework Agreement
fields.validation: set on call-off release; framework must be active + in-validity + remaining ceiling >= drawdown
fields.purpose: Marks an order issued as a call-off release against a pre-approved framework; the call-off draws down the ceiling without re-sourcing (no competitive approval), though SoD still applies to value-changing edits.

fields.name: attachments
fields.label: Attachments
fields.validation: documents; rendered PO PDF stored here, legacy MS-Word fallback recorded as attachment
fields.purpose: Holds the issued PO PDF and supporting documents so the exact artifact sent to the supplier is retained for the record (ISO 7.5).

invariants: A4 budget hard-committed at PO issue
A6 SoD: PO creator != PO approver, no self-approval
A7 PO auto-approval within approverLimit on valueInBase
A8 match type three-way iff GRN exists else two-way + milestone for service/freight
A10 supplier must be ONBOARDED; SUSPENDED blocks new POs
A13 audit + SSE on every change
